title: MKBU Results 2026 Key Highlights

detail.title: MKBU Results 2026 Key Highlights
detail.short_info: Maharaja Krishnakumarsinhji Bhavnagar University Result 2026 released for BCA 3rd Semester [NEP] Sept–Oct–Nov–Dec 2025 exam on the official website - mkbhavuni.edu.in on 30-03-2026. Check the direct link provided here and the steps to download the MKBU result.

content.text: Maharaja Krishnakumarsinhji Bhavnagar University has declared MKBU Results 2026 for the B.C.A. Sem-3 [NEP] Sept–Oct–Nov–Dec 2025 examination. MKBU Result 2026 has been announced online on the official website - mkbhavuni.edu.in - through the central result page at mkbhavuni.edu.in/mkbhavuniweb/result.php.

BCA 3rd semester students under the NEP pattern can now download the official result PDF and check their seat number, subject wise marks and overall pass/fail status. After checking the marksheet, candidates should verify their personal and course details and contact the university or college examination cell in case of any discrepancy.

The latest MKBU result update is focused on undergraduate computer applications under the National Education Policy (NEP). The university has published the reassessment/regular result for the September–December 2025 BCA 3rd semester exam session, helping students confirm their progression in the programme.

MKBU publishes course wise result PDFs under the result section, where each file name clearly mentions the programme, semester, scheme and exam period. Students can use the following links to open the BCA 3rd semester NEP result and the general result page.

links.label: MKBU Result Portal – All UG/PG Results 2026

content.text: Follow these steps to check and download your MKBU BCA 3rd Semester [NEP] Result 2026:

items: In the list of result links, search for “2125-B.C.A. Sem-3 [NEP] SEPT-OCT-NOV-DEC-2025” and click on it (or use the direct PDF link provided above).
Let the PDF open in your browser.
Press Ctrl+F and enter your Seat Number / Roll Number to find your entry quickly.
Check your name, seat number, course, semester, subject wise marks/grades and overall result status (Pass/Fail/ATKT).
Download or print the PDF for your academic record, revaluation process (if available) and future reference.

structured_links.label: MKBU Result Portal – All UG/PG Results 2026
